reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4eC1EV2N3EAE

reviews.comment:
Los baños super limpios y con jabón y papel, la atención el playa muy buena, solo.que siempre hay mucha gente, la atención en el Shop regular, salvo el señor mayor que te entrega los pedidos que su atención y compromiso es optimo, precios igual que en todos los Shop YPF

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were super clean and had soap and toilet paper, the service at the station was very good, although it's always crowded. The service at the shop was just okay, except for the older gentleman who delivers orders; his service and commitment were excellent. Prices were the same as at all YPF shops.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4aV9tYy1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Exelente atención.
Sempre demoramos en cargar combustible, siempre hay cola de autos. Digo en horario de transito norma diurnol. Único problema de hace décadas.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service.
We always take a while to fill up with fuel, and there's always a line of cars. I'm talking about normal daytime traffic hours. The only problem is decades old.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4NmJ5MlhREAE

reviews.comment:
Es una parada exitosa: descanso, café (y comida fría y caliente), combustible, regalos, recuerdos y hotel por si quieres dormir un rato reparador o toda la noche. Altamente recomendable

(Translated by Google)
It's a great stop: rest, coffee (and hot and cold food), fuel, gifts, souvenirs, and a hotel if you want a good night's sleep or even just a rest. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4enRiOXJnRRAB
